columns.name: estado
columns.check: estado::text = ANY (ARRAY['candidato'::character varying, 'inscrito'::character varying, 'aprobado'::character varying, 'desaprobado'::character varying, 'ausente'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: estado
columns.check: estado::text = ANY (ARRAY['activo'::character varying, 'suspendido'::character varying, 'retirado'::character varying, 'prueba'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: estado
columns.check: estado::text = ANY (ARRAY['pagado'::character varying, 'pendiente'::character varying, 'vencido'::character varying, 'anulado'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: estado
columns.check: estado::text = ANY (ARRAY['planificado'::character varying, 'inscripciones'::character varying, 'en_curso'::character varying, 'finalizado'::character varying, 'cancelado'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: estado
columns.check: estado::text = ANY (ARRAY['programado'::character varying, 'inscripcion'::character varying, 'cerrado'::character varying, 'realizado'::character varying, 'cancelado'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: dirigido_a
columns.check: dirigido_a::text = ANY (ARRAY['todos'::character varying, 'admin'::character varying, 'maestros'::character varying, 'alumnos'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: tipo
columns.check: tipo::text = ANY (ARRAY['competidor'::character varying, 'coach'::character varying, 'delegado'::character varying, 'oficial'::character varying, 'staff'::character varying]::text[])

columns.name: modalidad
